title: Cinematorgraphy
description: This Modpack allows you to make the best of the best shots in Minecraft!
body:
# 🎬 Cinematography
A Fabric modpack tailored for Minecraft filmmakers, machinima creators, and aesthetic storytellers.

## 🧰 Features
Cinematography focuses on providing a visually rich and immersive experience while enhancing creative control for content creators. Whether you're filming epic battles, serene nature shots, or complex roleplays—this pack gives you the tools to direct like a pro.

## ✨ Visual Enhancements
- Iris & Sodium – Optimal performance with full shader support.

- Insanity, Solas, and Pastel Shaders – Aesthetic choices for every mood.

- Better Clouds, Falling Leaves, Particle Rain – Enhances atmosphere and realism.

- Visuality – Adds ambient particle effects to deepen immersion.

## 🎥 Cinematic Tools
- Camera Utils – Provides smooth and programmable camera paths.

- Motion Capture (Mocap) – Record and replay player actions.

- Flashback – In-game replay system for capturing scenes and shots.

## 🧩 Utility APIs
- Fabric API, Cloth Config, TCDCommons API – Ensures compatibility and mod stability.

## 🧪 Experimental & Fun Additions
- Spooklementary – Adds creepy seasonal effects.

- Explosive Enhancement – Bigger and better explosions for dramatic flair.
  
- Not Enough Animations – Makes characters feel more alive in cutscenes.

## 🔧 UI & Quality of Life
- Better Statistics Screen – Track performance and progress.

- Blur+ – Smooth UI blur effect for more polished visuals.

- Larion World Generation – Adds unique terrain variety for natural-looking sets.

## 🎞️ Ideal Use Cases
- Minecraft cinematics and trailers

- Aesthetic world tours and creative showcases
